content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against master, including src/cli/run.rs, src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs, and src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs, and ran the test suite. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues that rise to the level of a blocking amendment.

## Amendments

None.
